note: Seeded ground truth for the SP-D design benchmark. Structure is checked by test/fixtures-manifest.test.mjs; the reviewer is run against it by .claude/workflows/design-benchmark.js and scored by scripts/benchmark-score.mjs.

fixtures.summary: Correct tokens, broken hierarchy: two co-equal primaries, metadata louder than title, buried critical failure.
Informational monitoring board; correct with no primary CTA.
Clean, correct iOS grouped-settings screen: semantic colors, dark mode, clear title, 44pt rows, no over-cards. A true negative.
Delete-account screen: the irreversible consequence is tiny/faint and the destructive action is styled as a calm prominent primary.
